## What

What does this PR do? One or two sentences.

## Why

What problem does it solve? Link to an issue if applicable.

## How

Brief description of the approach. Call out any non-obvious design decisions.

## Testing

How was this tested? What should reviewers verify?

- [ ] All existing tests pass (`pnpm test`)
- [ ] New tests added for new functionality
- [ ] Linting passes (`pnpm lint`)

## Safety checklist

If this PR touches the decision pipeline:

- [ ] Policy engine checks are not bypassed
- [ ] Explanation records are generated
- [ ] Trust tier constraints are respected
- [ ] Risk assessments are included on candidate actions
